novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship: the abstract/§4 still sells interchangeability for CuiPuShiMiaoTchetgen2024 proximal DR users, but §8 does not phrase a strict result against Cui et al.'s published estimator, only against a newly defined residual-GMM selector.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: Native-equivalence through first order is defined as equality of selected ATE values and Gateaux derivatives, while C0 is algebraically the selected-value gap and C1 is the Jacobian of that same gap; the iff is largely a definitional unfold, so it cannot carry flagship weight without an independent characterization.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the Conjecture 1 iff with an independently characterized condition, such as an explicit kernel/row-space/rank criterion or a closed-form block-matrix condition not defined as the value-and-derivative discrepancy itself.

Either add a §8 result that explicitly connects the residual-GMM selector to the Cui et al. proximal DR moment/estimator, or downgrade all Cui language to motivation/consumer status outside the comparator promise.
To reach flagship tier, pair the row-commutator with an estimator/inference statement: sample analogue, asymptotic distribution, and a selector-sensitivity interval when the commutator is nonzero.

recommended_next_step: Revise Conjecture 1 into a non-tautological, independently computable frontier and repair the Cui comparator promise before sending to Stage 0.
